overview: Skeleton Footman is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Crypt, Goblin Cave, Inferno, Ruins, Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 67 HP, 22 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 5. Has a Staggered reaction in its ability set. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack1 at 160% ratio (352 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Combo Nightmare.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 3 melee attacks. Attack1 (160%), Attack2 (140%), Combo Nightmare (120%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Has Stagger Reaction (ImpactRes 3, Endurance 5)
strategies.description: This monster has a Staggered ability in its ability set, meaning it has a stagger reaction animation. ImpactResistance: 3, MaxImpactEndurance: 5.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2500), Divine (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Combo Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Combo Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Combo Nightmare

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
